errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: This page hit a temporary problem. Please try again — it usually works on a second attempt.

shell.chooseBranchSubtitle: Select the branch you're working at. New records you create will be saved to it. You can switch any time from the top bar.
shell.chooseBranchAllHint: Work across all branches (new records use the main branch)

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to your clinic workspace.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Start your 14-day free trial. No card required.
signup.confirmEmail: Check your inbox to confirm your email, then sign in to continue.

onboarding.setupDescription: Create your clinic workspace. You can add branches, doctors and staff once you're in. You start on a 14-day Starter trial.

pending.rejectedBody: Your account request was declined by an administrator. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact support.
pending.pendingBody: Thanks for signing up, {email}. A platform administrator needs to approve your account before you can set up your clinic. You'll be able to continue here once it's approved.

addUser.name: Name
addUser.created: User created — they can sign in now.

logoUploader.maxSize: Image must be 2 MB or smaller.
logoUploader.hint: PNG, JPG or SVG up to 2 MB. Appears in the side menu.

qrUploader.maxSize: Image must be 2 MB or smaller.
qrUploader.dragSelect: Drag on the image to select the area to keep.
qrUploader.hint: PNG, JPG or SVG up to 2 MB. You can crop it before uploading. Shown on invoices for this branch.
qrUploader.dragHint: Drag on the image to select the area to keep, then upload.

profileForm.name: Clinic name
profileForm.subtitle: Subtitle
profileForm.subtitleHint: Shown under the clinic name in the side menu.
profileForm.customFieldsHint: Add your own labelled details (e.g. Website, Working hours).

staff.title: Staff
staff.subtitle: Manage who can access {clinic} and what they can do
staff.addDescription: Create their login with a password — they can sign in right away.
staff.rolesDescription: Pick the role that matches a person's job. This list reflects the access each role currently grants.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the interface. Medical terms (medicine names, lab tests, diagnoses) always stay in English.

settings.title: Settings
settings.noAccess: You don't have access to any settings.

general.label: General
general.description: Clinic name, contact details, timezone and currency

billing.label: Billing
billing.description: Price catalog, procedures, memberships & payment settings

staff.label: Staff & roles
staff.description: Invite team members and assign their roles

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.description: Reminder channels, timing and message templates

form.name: Branch name
form.movePrimaryHint: To move the primary elsewhere, set another branch as primary.

subscription.onlyOwner: Only the clinic owner can change the plan.

dashboard.weeklyTrendsSummary: {count, plural, one {# appointment} other {# appointments}} in the last {days} days

insights.title: AI Clinic Assistant
insights.subtitle: Prioritized highlights from today's data
insights.emptyHint: Alerts appear here as activity builds up.

insightMsg.longWait: A patient has been waiting {minutes} minutes — call them in to avoid a longer delay.
insightMsg.queueWaiting: {count, plural, one {# patient is waiting in the queue — consider calling the next.} other {# patients are waiting in the queue — consider calling the next.}}
insightMsg.noDoctorHours: No doctors have hours scheduled today.
insightMsg.unpaidInvoices: {count, plural, one {# unpaid invoice totaling {total} outstanding.} other {# unpaid invoices totaling {total} outstanding.}}
insightMsg.lowStock: {count, plural, one {# medicine is at or below reorder level.} other {# medicines are at or below reorder level.}}
insightMsg.expiringBatches: {count, plural, one {# stock batch is expiring within 60 days.} other {# stock batches are expiring within 60 days.}}
insightMsg.allCompleted: All of today's appointments are completed — great work!

noAppointmentsToday.title: No appointments today
noAppointmentsToday.hint: When patients are booked, they'll show up here in order.

noDoctors.title: No doctors yet
noDoctors.hint: Add doctors and set their weekly hours to see who's in today.

queueClear.title: Queue is clear
queueClear.hint: Checked-in, in-consultation and completed patients show up here through the day.

noPatients.title: No patients yet
noPatients.hint: Register your first patient to start tracking your practice.

noRevenue.title: No revenue this period
noRevenue.hint: Recorded payments will be summarized here.

inventoryHealthy.title: Inventory healthy
inventoryHealthy.hint: No low-stock or expiring items right now.

noActivity.title: No recent activity
noActivity.hint: Actions across the clinic will appear here.

noAppointments.title: No appointments yet
noAppointments.hint: Your booking trend will chart here.

noRevenueYet.title: No revenue yet
noRevenueYet.hint: Monthly collected revenue will chart here.

noNewPatients.title: No new patients yet
noNewPatients.hint: New registrations over the last 30 days chart here.

noVisits.title: No visits this month
noVisits.hint: Visits recorded per doctor will chart here.

profile.activeMeds: {count, plural, one {# active med} other {# active meds}}
profile.noVisitsWalkIn: No visit records yet. Start one for a walk-in.

patients.title: Patients
patients.registered: {count, plural, one {# patient registered} other {# patients registered}}
patients.noPermission: You don't have permission to view patients.

table.name: Name
table.filterPlaceholder: Filter shown patients by number, name, gender, blood, phone…

form.duplicateTitle: {count, plural, one {# patient already has a similar name} other {# patients already have a similar name}} — check before registering:
form.duplicateConfirm: This is a different person — register anyway

purge.title: Delete patient permanently
purge.warning: This permanently deletes {name} and everything linked to them — visits, prescriptions, lab work, and all uploaded documents and files. This cannot be undone.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.noPermission: You don't have permission to view appointments.

catalog.name: Name
catalog.moduleHint: Prices set in the Laboratory, Imaging and Procedures modules. Edit a price here; manage names in each module.

payment.title: Payment settings
payment.subtitle: Per-branch KHQR, payment QR, currency and defaults

list.summary: {count, plural, one {# invoice} other {# invoices}} · {outstanding} outstanding

invoiceForm.bundledNote: {count, plural, one {Billed as one line covering # test.} other {Billed as one line covering # tests.}}

catalogRow.deleteConfirm: Delete this price permanently? Past invoices keep their amounts. Use Archive to hide it instead.

procedureCatalog.name: Procedure name
procedureCatalog.empty: No procedures yet. Add one above.

membershipCatalog.name: Plan name
membershipCatalog.empty: No membership plans yet. Add one above.

audit.title: Billing audit
audit.subtitle: Invoice, payment, refund and price changes

workspace.title: Billing workspace
workspace.pickPatient: Pick a patient to detect every billable activity from their visit.
workspace.noCharges: No unbilled charges detected for this patient. Add a manual item below.
workspace.bundledNote: {count, plural, one {Billed as one line covering # test.} other {Billed as one line covering # tests.}}
workspace.alertLabs: {count, plural, one {⚠ # unbilled lab test} other {⚠ # unbilled lab tests}}
workspace.alertMeds: {count, plural, one {⚠ # unbilled medicine} other {⚠ # unbilled medicines}}

suggestedCharges.noCharges: No charges on this visit yet.
suggestedCharges.unbillTitle: Remove from the draft invoice and edit
suggestedCharges.bundledNote: {count, plural, one {Billed as one line covering # test.} other {Billed as one line covering # tests.}}
suggestedCharges.dispenseNote: Dispensing reduces stock and adds the medicine as a billable Pharmacy charge above.
suggestedCharges.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one charge to bill.
suggestedCharges.workspaceTitle: Open the full billing workspace: it continues this visit's draft with every charge shown here — edit descriptions, quantities, manual items, discounts & tax, then issue
suggestedCharges.helperHasDraft: This visit already has a draft invoice. Open the workspace to add these charges, apply discounts & tax, and issue it.
suggestedCharges.helperDefault: Prices are prefilled from the catalog where available — adjust before creating the draft. Un-bill a charge to pull it back off the draft and re-price it. The billing workspace continues this same draft with every charge here (plus membership discount & tax).

profile.noCompleted: No completed appointments in this period.
profile.emrAttribution: EMR visits attributed to this doctor: {visits} · distinct patients: {patients}. Revenue is estimated (invoices are not yet attributed to a doctor).

doctors.title: Doctors
doctors.noPermission: You don't have permission to view doctors.

status.skipped: Logged — email isn't configured yet (set RESEND_API_KEY in Vercel).
status.failed: Send failed — see the notifications log.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noPermission: You don't have permission to view notifications.
notifications.summary: {count, plural, one {# reminder & message sent} other {# reminders & messages sent}}
notifications.empty: No notifications yet. Send a reminder from an appointment or invoice.

settings.pageSubtitle: Reminder channels, timing and message templates
settings.title: Reminders
settings.defaultChannelHint: Used when a patient has both an email and a Telegram contact.

templates.title: Message templates
templates.intro: Customize the subject and body for each reminder. Use {{variables}} that are replaced when the message is sent.
templates.subject: Subject

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.myDescription: Link your personal Telegram to receive your reminders and alerts here.
telegram.patientDescription: Share this connect link with the patient; once they start the bot, their reminders go to Telegram.
telegram.notConfigured: Telegram bot is not configured yet (set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_BOT_USERNAME and TELEGRAM_LINK_SECRET).
telegram.instructions: Scan the QR code, or open the link in Telegram and press Start. Then tap Refresh.
telegram.botSetupHint: One-time: after setting TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET, register the webhook so Telegram delivers messages to this app.

bot.title: Telegram bot
bot.hint: Use your own Telegram bot. Create one with @BotFather, then paste its token and username here. You can change or remove it anytime.

test.title: Send a test
test.hint: Send a test notification to your own connected channel to confirm delivery works.
test.skipped: No contact yet — connect Telegram above or add your email.
test.failed: Send failed — check the bot token and try again.

compose.title: New message
compose.subtitle: Send a message to a team member
compose.noMembers: No team members with an account yet.
